# LEZAC explosion playback oracle fixture v1
# Synthetic parser fixture: verifies reverse lane result far-pointer scratch parsing.
capture=explosion_playback
source=dosbox-regular-process-memory
temp_copy=1
visual_claim=0
instrumented_freeze_observed=1
runtime_freeze_patch_applied=1
freeze_expected_old_bytes=268805
freeze_old_bytes=268805
instrumented_lane_result_scratch_present=1
instrumented_lane_result_cs_offset=0xf280
instrumented_lane_result_kind=reverse
instrumented_lane_result_output=0x0000
instrumented_lane_result_es=0x2b3c
instrumented_lane_result_di=0x78d4
instrumented_lane_result_arg_offset=0x78d4
instrumented_lane_result_arg_segment=0x2b3c
instrumented_lane_result_result_local=0x0000
instrumented_lane_result_active_count=0x0001
instrumented_lane_result_loop_index=0x0001
instrumented_lane_result_target_before=0x0004
command=python3 tools/capture_original_explosion_procmem.py /tmp/lezac-lane-result-reverse . --freeze-ghidra-offset 1000:3ED3 --freeze-patch-mode lane-result-cs-scratch

runtime_cs=1A2B
runtime_ds=2B3C
high_debris_target_delta=0001
high_debris_target_offset=0394
high_debris_lookup_segment=3EF4
high_debris_word_layer_offset=0000
high_debris_word_layer_segment=3F71
high_debris_word_layer_address=0728
high_debris_c204=0010
high_debris_target_byte=75
high_debris_word_layer_value=8009

break ghidra=1000:75F1 runtime=1A2B:75F1 label=bomb_expire_dispatch_call
break ghidra=1000:414A runtime=1A2B:414A label=explosion_dispatcher
break ghidra=1000:370E runtime=1A2B:370E label=tile_damage_queue
break ghidra=1000:3A7E runtime=1A2B:3A7E label=damage_forward_lookup
break ghidra=1000:3B18 runtime=1A2B:3B18 label=damage_reverse_lookup
break ghidra=1000:3BB2 runtime=1A2B:3BB2 label=collapse_forward_pass
break ghidra=1000:3D46 runtime=1A2B:3D46 label=collapse_reverse_pass
break ghidra=1000:3ED3 runtime=1A2B:3ED3 label=collapse_reverse_lane_result_write observed=runtime_child_memory_freeze_observed
break ghidra=1000:45FA runtime=1A2B:45FA label=effect_debris_update_entry
break ghidra=1000:492F runtime=1A2B:492F label=high_debris_loop_entry
break ghidra=1000:4B3F runtime=1A2B:4B3F label=high_debris_target_sample
break ghidra=1000:4B61 runtime=1A2B:4B61 label=high_debris_target_byte_gate
break ghidra=1000:4B6A runtime=1A2B:4B6A label=high_debris_zero_target_branch
break ghidra=1000:4C20 runtime=1A2B:4C20 label=high_debris_nonzero_target_branch
break ghidra=1000:4C75 runtime=1A2B:4C75 label=high_debris_word_gate
break ghidra=1000:4C96 runtime=1A2B:4C96 label=effect_forward_pass_call
break ghidra=1000:4C99 runtime=1A2B:4C99 label=effect_forward_pass_return
break ghidra=1000:4CA9 runtime=1A2B:4CA9 label=effect_reverse_pass_call
break ghidra=1000:4CAC runtime=1A2B:4CAC label=effect_reverse_pass_return

dump DS:2090
2B3C:2090  00 00 00 93 03 00 c0 04 05 00 00 00 6b 00 00 00

dump DS:6610
2B3C:6610  00 06 0a 08 0a 09 80 02 03 00 00 05 00 00 00 04

dump DS:C1E0
2B3C:C1E0  6b 6c 6d 6e 6f 70 71 72 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

dump DS:C21E
2B3C:C21E  18 00 28 00 84 75 08 05 20 00 30 00 85 75 09 05
